_comment: Default backend is MongoDB (backend_mode db). Set backend_mode to api to use only REST. Symbol format: exchange suffix (e.g., 000858.SZ, 600519.SH). execution.trading_sessions=CN_A means 09:25-11:30 and 13:00-15:00 on weekdays. Set execution.sell_barrier_mode=hard to enforce sell-before-buy barriers after gray validation; env QUANT_TRADER_* overrides JSON.
